detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Apeinja._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Apeinja.sol#665-789):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (Apeinja.sol#729)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (Apeinja.sol#803-815)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (Apeinja.sol#735)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (Apeinja.sol#823)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (Apeinja.sol#787)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (Apeinja.sol#949)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (Apeinja.sol#929)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (Apeinja.sol#931)
	Apeinja._rOwned (Apeinja.sol#341) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Apeinja._takeTeam(uint256) (Apeinja.sol#943-951)
	- Apeinja._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (Apeinja.sol#903-939)
	- Apeinja.balanceOf(address) (Apeinja.sol#491-495)
	- Apeinja.constructor() (Apeinja.sol#425-455)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (Apeinja.sol#787)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (Apeinja.sol#957)
	Apeinja._rTotal (Apeinja.sol#353) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Apeinja._getCurrentSupply() (Apeinja.sol#1099-1109)
	- Apeinja._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (Apeinja.sol#955-961)
	- Apeinja.constructor() (Apeinja.sol#425-455)
	- Apeinja.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (Apeinja.sol#587-609)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [Apeinja._transfer(address,address,uint256)](Apeinja.sol#L665-L789):
	External calls:
	- [swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance)](Apeinja.sol#L729)
		- [uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp)](Apeinja.sol#L803-L815)
	External calls sending eth:
	- [sendETHToFee(address(this).balance)](Apeinja.sol#L735)
		- [_marketingAddress.transfer(amount)](Apeinja.sol#L823)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](Apeinja.sol#L787)
		- [_rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam)](Apeinja.sol#L949)
		- [_rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount)](Apeinja.sol#L929)
		- [_rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount)](Apeinja.sol#L931)
	[Apeinja._rOwned](Apeinja.sol#L341) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [Apeinja._takeTeam(uint256)](Apeinja.sol#L943-L951)
	- [Apeinja._transferStandard(address,address,uint256)](Apeinja.sol#L903-L939)
	- [Apeinja.balanceOf(address)](Apeinja.sol#L491-L495)
	- [Apeinja.constructor()](Apeinja.sol#L425-L455)
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](Apeinja.sol#L787)
		- [_rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee)](Apeinja.sol#L957)
	[Apeinja._rTotal](Apeinja.sol#L353) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [Apeinja._getCurrentSupply()](Apeinja.sol#L1099-L1109)
	- [Apeinja._reflectFee(uint256,uint256)](Apeinja.sol#L955-L961)
	- [Apeinja.constructor()](Apeinja.sol#L425-L455)
	- [Apeinja.tokenFromReflection(uint256)](Apeinja.sol#L587-L609)
